summary: Iteration 11 - Enhanced Agent Configuration with 6 Tabs. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified including 6-tab navigation, Personality config (tone/sliders/flags), Knowledge CRUD, Integrations cards, Channels cards with Telegram bot token input, Escalation settings, and Automations with follow-up rules.

minor.issue: Model requires agent_id in body even though it comes from URL path (works but redundant)
Model requires agent_id in body even though it comes from URL path (works but redundant)

critical_code_review_comments: KnowledgeCreate and FollowUpRuleCreate models have agent_id as required field but the router uses path parameter and overwrites it. Consider making agent_id optional in these models since it comes from URL.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test knowledge items and follow-up rules during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified: Enhanced Agent Configuration Page with 6 tabs is fully functional. Features tested: (1) Personality tab - 5 tone buttons, 5 sliders (Emoji, Verbosity, Proactivity, Creativity, Formality), 5 behavior flags. (2) Knowledge tab - add/delete knowledge items, additional instructions textarea. (3) Integrations tab - 5 cards (Google Calendar/Sheets/Drive, Custom API, Webhooks) with connect buttons. (4) Channels tab - 6 cards (Telegram/WhatsApp/Instagram/Messenger/SMS/WebChat), Telegram shows bot token input and Connect Bot button when enabled. (5) Escalation tab - keywords input, frustration threshold slider, notify toggle, system prompt textarea, Test Agent button. (6) Automations tab - follow-up toggle, max/cooldown config, add/delete rules with trigger type selector. Save button persists all configs via PUT /api/agents/{id}. Backend stores personality_config in personality.config, integrations_config/channel_config in ai_config.integrations/channels.

backend_apis: GET /api/agents/{id} - returns personality_config, integrations_config, channel_config (extracted from JSON columns)
PUT /api/agents/{id} - stores personality_config, integrations_config, channel_config, tone, emoji_level, verbosity_level, escalation_rules, follow_up_config
POST /api/telegram/setup - validates bot token format (returns 400 for invalid)

tabs: Personality - Tone buttons (Professional/Friendly/Empathetic/Direct/Consultive), Fine Tuning sliders (Emoji/Verbosity/Proactivity/Creativity/Formality), Behaviors toggles (Auto multilingual/Remember context/Auto escalate/Suggest products/Collect data), Preview section
Knowledge - Add button, knowledge items with type badges and delete buttons, Additional instructions textarea
Integrations - 5 cards (Google Calendar/Sheets/Drive, Custom API, Webhooks) with Connect/Connected toggle buttons
Channels - 6 cards (Telegram Bot/WhatsApp/Instagram DM/Facebook Messenger/SMS/Web Chat) with Enable/Active toggle. Telegram shows bot token input and Connect Bot button when enabled
Escalation - Escalation keywords input, Frustration threshold slider (0-100%), Notify operator toggle, System Prompt textarea, Test Agent in Sandbox button
Automations - Auto Follow-up toggle. When enabled: Max Follow-ups input, Cooldown (days) input, Reactivation Rules section with Add button and existing rules list
frontend_agent_config_page.header: Agent name input, agent type/tone display, Save button

mocked_apis_note: Telegram Bot API connection requires real bot token from @BotFather (returns 400 with fake token - expected). Google integrations are UI toggles only (not connected to real Google APIs).
